heading: Minors
label: 1765 Minors
text: Shares may be issued in the name of a minor or in trust, subject to such conditions as may be prescribed by the bylaws. When shares are issued in trust, the name of the beneficiary shall be disclosed to the Federal credit union.
notes: Amendments1959— substituted “When shares are issued in trust, the” for “The” in second sentence.Pub. L. 86–354
amendments: Amendments1959— substituted “When shares are issued in trust, the” for “The” in second sentence.Pub. L. 86–354
